passages.text: Sara gets up at seven o'clock. She washes her face and brushes her teeth. Then she eats breakfast. She has bread with butter and a glass of milk. She puts on her red dress and goes to school. She walks to school with her friend Lily.

questions.question: What time does Sara get up?
What does Sara have for breakfast?
How does Sara go to school?

passages.title: Sara gets up at seven o'clock

passages.text: The weather is sunny and hot today. Kim and her dad go to the park. Kim wears a yellow hat and sunglasses. She plays on the swing. Her dad sits on a green chair and reads a book. They drink cold water. Kim is very happy.

questions.question: What does Kim's dad do at the park?

passages.title: The weather is sunny and hot today

passages.text: In my classroom there are ten desks. The desks are blue. My teacher is Mrs. Green. She is nice. She writes on the board with white chalk. I sit next to Ben. We have a red clock on the wall. There are three windows. The room is big.

questions.question: How many desks are in the classroom?

passages.title: In my classroom there are ten desks
